title: delphinium delavayi var. baoshanense
intro: Delphinium delavayi var. baoshanense is a variety of the Delphinium delavayi plant, a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family, native to China. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-microbial effects. The health benefits of Delphinium delavayi var. baoshanense include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and alleviating rheumatic pain. Delphinium delavayi var. baoshanense is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
